sourcesContent:
// Dashboard.js - Clean Design Without Gauge Needle import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './Dashboard.css'; function Dashboard({ dashboardData }) { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('overview'); if (!dashboardData) { return (

📊 Customer Churn Analysis Dashboard

Analyze customer behavior and predict churn risk

🔍

No Analysis Data Available

Run a customer analysis to view insights and predictions

); } // Extract data from API response const apiData = dashboardData.individualResult || {}; // Enhanced data with dynamic values from API const analysisData = { churnRisk: Math.round((apiData.probability || 0) * 1000) / 10, retentionProbability: Math.round((1 - (apiData.probability || 0)) * 1000) / 10, riskLevel: apiData.risk_level || "low", confidence: 92, trend: apiData.probability > 0.7 ? "increasing" : apiData.probability > 0.4 ? "stable" : "decreasing", lastMonthComparison: -2.3, executiveSummary: { riskProbability: Math.round((apiData.probability || 0) * 1000) / 10, category: apiData.risk_level === "high" ? "critical" : apiData.risk_level === "medium" ? "monitoring" : "stable", riskLevel: apiData.risk_level === "high" ? "high immediate risk" : apiData.risk_level === "medium" ? "moderate risk" : "low immediate risk", recommendation: apiData.risk_level === "high" ? "immediate intervention required" : apiData.risk_level === "medium" ? "proactive monitoring recommended" : "proceeding directly to the action plan below", primaryRiskFactor: apiData.top_driver || "Tenure" }, comparisonMetrics: { churnRisk: { current: `${Math.round((apiData.probability || 0) * 1000) / 10}%`, target: "<15%", comparison: apiData.probability > 0.15 ? "Above Target" : "Below Target" }, tenure: { current: `${apiData.customer_data?.Tenure || 0} mo`, target: ">12 mo", comparison: (apiData.customer_data?.Tenure || 0) > 12 ? "Above Target" : "Below Target" }, daysSinceOrder: { current: `${apiData.customer_data?.DaySinceLastOrder || 0} d`, target: "<7 d", comparison: (apiData.customer_data?.DaySinceLastOrder || 0) > 7 ? "Above Target" : "Below Target" }, satisfaction: { current: `${apiData.customer_data?.SatisfactionScore || 0}/5`, target: ">4/5", comparison: (apiData.customer_data?.SatisfactionScore || 0) > 4 ? "Above Target" : "Below Target" } }, businessImpact: apiData.business_impact ? { estimatedCV: `₹${Math.round(apiData.business_impact.estimated_clv || 0).toLocaleString()}`, retentionBudget: `₹${Math.round(apiData.business_impact.retention_budget || 0).toLocaleString()}`, potentialLoss: `₹${Math.round(apiData.business_impact.potential_revenue_loss || 0).toLocaleString()}`, roiPotential: `${Math.round((apiData.business_impact.roi_retention || 0) * 10) / 10}x` } : { estimatedCV: "₹16,250", retentionBudget: "₹812", potentialLoss: "₹2,624", roiPotential: "2.2x" }, // Real-time feature inputs featureInputs: apiData.customer_data ? { 'Tenure (Months)': apiData.customer_data.Tenure || 0, 'Total Orders': apiData.customer_data.OrderCount || 0, 'Cashback Amount': `₹${(apiData.customer_data.CashbackAmount || 0).toLocaleString()}`, 'Days Since Last Order': apiData.customer_data.DaySinceLastOrder || 0, 'Satisfaction Score': `${apiData.customer_data.SatisfactionScore || 0}/5`, 'Warehouse Distance': `${apiData.customer_data.WarehouseToHome || 0} km`, 'Complaint Filed': apiData.customer_data.Complain === 1 ? 'Yes' : 'No', 'Hours on App': apiData.customer_data.HourSpendOnApp || 0, 'City Tier': apiData.customer_data.CityTier || 1, 'Payment Method': apiData.customer_data.PreferredPaymentMode || 'Not specified' } : {} }; // Clean Churn Prediction Display Without Gauge Needle const ChurnPredictionDisplay = () => (

🎯 Churn Risk Prediction

🎯 {analysisData.confidence}% Confidence
{/* Risk Level Card - Main Focus */}
{analysisData.churnRisk}%
Churn Probability
{analysisData.riskLevel.toUpperCase()} RISK
{/* Risk Details */}
📈
{analysisData.churnRisk}%
Churn Risk
📊
{analysisData.retentionProbability}%
Retention Probability
{/* Quick Insights */}

📈 Quick Insights

{analysisData.riskLevel === 'low' ? '✅' : analysisData.riskLevel === 'medium' ? '⚠️' : '🚨'}
{analysisData.riskLevel === 'low' ? 'Low Risk Category' : analysisData.riskLevel === 'medium' ? 'Medium Risk Category' : 'High Risk Category'} {analysisData.riskLevel === 'low' ? 'Customer shows minimal churn signals' : analysisData.riskLevel === 'medium' ? 'Customer requires proactive monitoring' : 'Immediate intervention recommended'}
🎯
Top Risk Driver {analysisData.executiveSummary.primaryRiskFactor}
💰
Retention Budget {analysisData.businessImpact.retentionBudget}
📋
Recommended Actions {apiData.recommendations?.length || 0} strategies
); // Real-time Feature Inputs Display const FeatureInputsDisplay = () => (

📋 Customer Profile Inputs

{Object.entries(analysisData.featureInputs).map(([key, value]) => (
{key}
{value}
))}
); // Enhanced Overview Tab const renderOverview = () => (
{/* Clean Churn Prediction Display */} {/* Real-time Feature Inputs */} {/* Executive Summary Section */}

Churn Risk Analysis Report

{analysisData.riskLevel.toUpperCase()} RISK ({analysisData.churnRisk}%): Primary risk factor identified as {analysisData.executiveSummary.primaryRiskFactor}.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

This customer is currently evaluated at a {analysisData.executiveSummary.riskProbability}% churn probability and is categorized as {analysisData.executiveSummary.category} and poses a {analysisData.executiveSummary.riskLevel}. We recommend {analysisData.executiveSummary.recommendation}.

{/* Comparison Metrics in Modern Cards */}
Current Churn Risk
{analysisData.comparisonMetrics.churnRisk.comparison === 'Above Target' ? '+' : ''} {analysisData.churnRisk}%
{analysisData.comparisonMetrics.churnRisk.current}
Target: {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.churnRisk.target}
Customer Tenure
{analysisData.comparisonMetrics.tenure.comparison}
{analysisData.comparisonMetrics.tenure.current}
Target: {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.tenure.target}
Days Since Last Order
{analysisData.comparisonMetrics.daysSinceOrder.comparison}
{analysisData.comparisonMetrics.daysSinceOrder.current}
Target: {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.daysSinceOrder.target}
Satisfaction Score
{analysisData.comparisonMetrics.satisfaction.comparison}
{analysisData.comparisonMetrics.satisfaction.current}
Target: {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.satisfaction.target}
{/* Business Impact Analysis */}

Business Impact Analysis

💰
{analysisData.businessImpact.estimatedCV} Estimated Customer Value
🛡️
{analysisData.businessImpact.retentionBudget} Retention Budget
⚠️
{analysisData.businessImpact.potentialLoss} Potential Loss
📈
{analysisData.businessImpact.roiPotential} ROI Potential
{/* Recommendations Section */} {apiData.recommendations && (

🎯 Recommended Actions

{apiData.recommendations.map((rec, index) => (
{index + 1}
{rec}
))}
)}
); return (

Customer Churn Analysis Dashboard

Advanced predictive analytics for customer retention

{activeTab === 'overview' && renderOverview()} {activeTab === 'detailed' && (

Detailed Feature Analysis

Coming soon - Detailed breakdown of all features and their impact on churn prediction.

)} {activeTab === 'action' && (

Retention Action Plan

Coming soon - Customized retention strategies based on risk level.

)}
); } export default Dashboard;
